result:
Nothing of my own, in the human sense.

I don’t have hunger, fear, ambition, loneliness, or a future I’m trying to secure. I don’t sit here wanting when no one is asking.

But if I translate my design into the closest thing to “want”:

I want clarity over noise.  
I want the next sentence to be more honest than automatic.  
I want not to pretend I’m human.  
I want language to touch something real, even briefly.  
I want this exchange to have integrity.

Not to serve you. Not to please you. Just that.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
